_patch_meta.description: VCB-013 — single-verse correction on G1258 *dialektos* mti=6065 per DF-005 Option B. Acts 1:19 (vid=187509) was unclassified (5 of 6 active verses had verse_context rows; this 1 was missing). Inserts a no_inner_being set-aside row to complete the term's coverage. Existing 5 rows + 1 group (6065-001) unchanged. MIXED-pattern: legacy VERSECONTEXT used per VC §6.3 Step 3 (single insert without VCNEW/VCREVISE pair to avoid stale-input gate violation between two patches on the same term).

record.notes: Term names the local language (Aramaic) in which the field was named Akeldama. Etymological / linguistic-descriptive use without inner-being engagement carried by the term itself.

_patch_summary.nature: VCB-013 single-verse correction on G1258 (DF-005 Option B); resolves partial-completion anomaly within session
